learn.core_idea: With limited frames, pages can be evicted before reuse, causing repeated faults.
mechanism_steps: Introduce additional pages beyond frame capacity.
Later reuse faults if evicted page is needed again.
learn.worked_example: A loop over more pages than frames repeatedly faults on revisits.
common_mistakes: Assuming revisit always means TLB/page hit.
pre_challenge_checklist: I can reason about frame pressure.
I can validate expected fault total.
